name: Pecan Tassies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cream cheese, 1/2 cup butter, 1 cup all-purpose flour, and 1/4 teaspoon salt until blended. Chill this mixture for at least an hour.
2. Form the dough into 24 small balls, then press them into the bottom and sides of ungreased miniature muffin tins.
3. Blend the remaining ingredients, except the pecans, to make the filling.
4. Sprinkle a few nuts in the bottom of each pastry shell. Pour the filling mixture over the nuts to fill each cup 3/4 full.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the filling is set.
6. Cool slightly and remove from the tins by running a knife around the edges.
